creator: takefu@airport.fm
text:
- Update to 2.1.9
   add reload command
 Port maintainer (bra@fsn.hu) is cc'd.
> How-To-Repeat:
> Fix:
 --- mail/dovecot2.patch begins here ---
 diff -ruN /usr/ports/mail/dovecot2/Makefile mail/dovecot2/Makefile
 --- /usr/ports/mail/dovecot2/Makefile	2012-09-04 12:05:23.000000000 +0900
 +++ mail/dovecot2/Makefile	2012-09-13 16:18:24.000000000 +0900
 @@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
  #
 
  PORTNAME=	dovecot
 -PORTVERSION=	2.1.8
 +PORTVERSION=	2.1.9
  CATEGORIES=	mail ipv6
  MASTER_SITES=	http://www.dovecot.org/releases/${PORTVERSION:R}/
 
 diff -ruN /usr/ports/mail/dovecot2/distinfo mail/dovecot2/distinfo
 --- /usr/ports/mail/dovecot2/distinfo	2012-07-08 01:26:03.000000000 +0900
 +++ mail/dovecot2/distinfo	2012-09-13 15:56:33.000000000 +0900
 @@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 -SHA256 (dovecot-2.1.8.tar.gz) = 48807384f815072cf5a9c8a94726b4179433d4a3dd35f33cbe8db3a7880b000d
 -SIZE (dovecot-2.1.8.tar.gz) = 3807008
 +SHA256 (dovecot-2.1.9.tar.gz) = 77d11112bced9e2bbb1410ce5e6464af477775315ec67c7f3ab4d0da64e3c512
 +SIZE (dovecot-2.1.9.tar.gz) = 3829755
 diff -ruN /usr/ports/mail/dovecot2/files/dovecot.in mail/dovecot2/files/dovecot.in
 --- /usr/ports/mail/dovecot2/files/dovecot.in	2012-08-06 08:19:36.000000000 +0900
 +++ mail/dovecot2/files/dovecot.in	2012-09-13 16:49:38.000000000 +0900
 @@ -17,6 +17,8 @@
  name=dovecot
  rcvar=dovecot_enable
 
 +extra_commands="reload"
 +
  # read configuration and set defaults
  load_rc_config ${name}
  : ${dovecot_enable:="NO"}
 @@ -26,6 +28,7 @@
  start_precmd="start_precmd"
  stop_postcmd="stop_postcmd"
  restart_cmd="restart_cmd"
 +reload_cmd="reload_cmd"
 
  start_precmd()
  {	# Ensure runtime directories exist with correct permissions
 @@ -46,6 +49,11 @@
  	run_rc_command start
  }
 
 +reload_cmd()
 +{
 +	%%PREFIX%%/bin/doveadm reload
 +}
 +
  # To start multiple instances of dovecot set dovecot_config to
  # a space seperated list of configuration files.
  if checkyesno ${name}_enable; then
 --- mail/dovecot2.patch ends here ---
